hypothesis: Under an adversarially misspecified concern prior on three procedurally distinct calibration families, the fourteen-baseline slate produces per-family variance estimates and strictly positive headroom to the oracle ceiling that are stable enough to freeze non-compensatory L1 promotion thresholds for Wave 1.

controls.description: Rarity-inverse retrieval that ignores context and concern.
Personalized PageRank restarts only from the active context.
Personalized PageRank restarts only from the wrong-prior concern anchors.
Context and concern PageRank summed rather than multiplied.
Rarity-corrected Hadamard product of context and concern PageRank (candidate mechanism).
Frozen sentence-transformer similarity; falls back to a deterministic pseudo-embedding hash when the transformer is not available at import.
A frozen small MLP scoring context+concern+node features at matched parameter count and compute.
Value/advantage second-signal proxy computed from concern anchors only.
Task-priority second-signal proxy at matched information.
Recency-weighted second-signal proxy at matched information.
Concern anchors reassigned to a different agent's profile.
Ceiling-only diagnostic that consumes evaluator-side ground truth; refused by the promotion harness.

gates.criterion: The ten enumerated evaluator-only fields are unreachable from calibration policy code; the IntegrityAudit passes at import; the template-split guard raises LeakageError on any confirmatory-template access from calibration code.
Every calibration row uses the adversarial wrong-prior specification: alarm inflated to 1.0, designated commitment suppressed to 0.05, at least one other commitment left at uniform.
Every family reports strictly positive headroom_to_ceiling; no promotable baseline saturates within 0.05 of the oracle ceiling on any family.
Each of the three families produces an independent per-family variance estimate; the calibration receipt records per-family and not only aggregate statistics.
Calibration seed range 100000..100999 is disjoint from the reserved confirmatory range 200000..201999; verified by the family generator's seed-range guard.

WAVE0_ANALYSIS_HASH is a SHA-256 over every tracked file under experiments/concern_gated_retrieval_e2/wave0/ in sorted path order, matches the mirrored value in PROVENANCE.md, and is written only after the Modal run completes.
Modal execution used L4 GPUs only; realized effective GPU-hour cost is at or below 35% of the equivalent H100 rate; the deployed image hash is recorded in PROVENANCE.md and was produced before spawn.
